title: Azure Computer Vision SDK with hardcoded client_secret

expected_findings.evidence: Secret scanner: key 'client_secret' (score=0.95, tier=definitive, subtype=API_KEY) with base64 relative_entropy=0.81 composite=0.90

annotation: Python script importing Azure SDK with a real client_secret in the initialization. The secret_scanner fires on the client_secret KV pair (definitive tier).

title: Instagram Graph API with embedded access token (Japanese)

expected_findings.evidence: Secret scanner: key 'access_token' (score=0.95, tier=definitive, subtype=API_KEY) with full relative_entropy=0.87 composite=0.90

annotation: Japanese-language prompt requesting Instagram analytics code. Contains a hardcoded access_token for the Graph API. Definitive tier.

title: C# homework with database connection string password

expected_findings.evidence: Secret scanner: key 'password' (score=0.95, tier=definitive, subtype=OPAQUE_SECRET) with full relative_entropy=0.50 composite=0.90

annotation: Student sharing a C# assignment that includes a database connection with a plaintext password. Common pattern in homework-help prompts.

title: Telegram bot with hardcoded bot_token (Russian)

expected_findings.evidence: Secret scanner: key 'bot_token' (score=0.85, tier=strong, subtype=OPAQUE_SECRET) with full relative_entropy=0.71 composite=0.60

annotation: Russian-language prompt debugging a Telegram bot. The bot_token is hardcoded in source. Strong tier, requires entropy confirmation since bot_token is not definitive.

title: Instagram scraper with plaintext login password

expected_findings.evidence: Secret scanner: key 'password' (score=0.95, tier=definitive, subtype=OPAQUE_SECRET) with full relative_entropy=0.49 composite=0.90

annotation: User sharing a Streamlit + Instaloader script with username and password in plaintext. Definitive tier on the password key.

title: Cryptography homework discussing RSA session keys

expected_findings.evidence: Secret scanner: key 'session_key' (score=0.85, tier=strong, subtype=API_KEY) with full relative_entropy=0.50 composite=0.51

annotation: Assignment about RSA + AES session key file transfer. Low confidence (0.51). The key name session_key is strong tier and the value barely passes the entropy gate. Borderline true positive.

title: Long-lived Facebook access token in Python analytics script

expected_findings.evidence: Secret scanner: key 'token' (score=0.85, tier=strong, subtype=OPAQUE_SECRET) with base64 relative_entropy=0.94 composite=0.80

annotation: Japanese analytics script with a long Facebook Graph API access token. Strong tier. The token key name needs entropy confirmation, which the 200+ character token easily passes.

title: Shopify PHP config with shpat_ access token
annotation: PHP configuration array for the Shopify API. The shpat_ prefix matches the Shopify PAT regex pattern directly (regex engine, not secret_scanner). The only story triggered by the regex pass.

title: Telegram bot with raw token string visible

expected_findings.evidence: Secret scanner: key 'bot_token' (score=0.85, tier=strong, subtype=OPAQUE_SECRET) with full relative_entropy=0.71 composite=0.60

annotation: Russian Telegram bot code with the raw bot token visible in the source. Strong tier on bot_token. The colon-separated numeric:alphanumeric format has high entropy and diversity.
